SysCron.name: DynamicRoleSync
SysCron.description: Re-evaluate every role's dynamic_filter and refresh the DYNAMIC rows in user_role. PerTenant: the scheduler fans out one message per active tenant (each carries its tenantId), and user-starter's UserMaintenanceCronConsumer runs DynamicRoleSyncJob.syncAll() under that tenant context (syncAll is single-tenant by contract). Seeded via loadPreSystemData - active=true so it runs on load. tenantJobMode uses the @JsonValue code 'PerTenant', matching the DB column.
